notes: New quarter opens after record-setting first half (VIX calm at 16.9) but bubble-fear chatter is building and the June jobs report lands Thursday in this holiday-shortened week; cash thin at $53 keeps me at 0.5 with no room to reach.
journal_entry: Wed 7/1 09:00: rolled into Q3 holding neutral/0.5, VIX 16.9. AMAT record-high stays favored; MU/SNDK soft, GETY hit by terminated Shutterstock merger and note redemption, ABCL/FCEL overextended remain no-chase. Cash $53 caps adds; bracing for Thursday's early payrolls and watching whether the tech-bubble narrative cracks the tape.
